name: Arke

skills.name: Kiss of Death
skills.description: Attacks launched from the front of the target will not crit, but backstabs are guaranteed to crit.

skills.name: Arclight
skills.description: Arke attacks twice in a row, dealing physical damage.

skills.name: Untouchable
skills.description: Arke dashes forward and attacks, marking an enemy while dealing physical damage and gaining Attack Speed. Attacking marked targets slows them and reduces this skill's cooldown. She takes less damage from marked targets.

skills.name: Phantom Dance
skills.description: Enters stealth, gaining a Movement Speed boost and Health recovery. Enhances attack after exiting stealth, granting extra Movement Speed boost when dealing damage, and refreshes all skill cooldowns with defeats and assists.

tips: Arke is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 52.4% win rate and 0.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Resistance → Axe of Torment → Eternity Blade → Master Sword → Starbreaker.
Run Dominator for stats that match Arke's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Arclight → Untouchable → Phantom Dance → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Arke excels into Alessio, Da Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan without team peel.

Arke is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.8% — expect Arke to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Arke good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Arke is Tier A Assassin with 52.4% win rate, 0.6% pick rate, and 0.8% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Arke build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Resistance, Axe of Torment, Eternity Blade, Master Sword, Starbreaker. Run Dominator arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Arke?
faqs.answer: Pick Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan into Arke. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Arke completes core items. Arke struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Arke counter?
faqs.answer: Arke is strong into Alessio, Da Qiao according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Arke when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Arke good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Arke is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.8% — expect Arke to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Arke play?
faqs.answer: Arke is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Arke?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Dominator arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Arke or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Arke vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Arke has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Arke?
faqs.answer: Yes in tryhard queues — 0.8% ban rate. Deny if enemy first-picks Assassin.

metaAnalysis: Tier A Assassin · Jungling · difficulty Medium.

Arke is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.4% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Ban rate 0.8% — expect Arke to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.
Matchups: strong into Alessio, Da Qiao; weak into Bai Qi, Arthur, Cai Yan.
Arke vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Arke has +2.6% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Arke vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Arke has +1.6% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Arke when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.
Draft tip: counter-pick or comfort pick when lane matchup is favorable.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Phantom Dance (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Untouchable provides mobility or stick—max first. Arclight second for damage. Phantom Dance on every level.
